mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, birthday = #{birthday}, hobbies = #{hobbies}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, gender = #{gender}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET hobbies = #{hobbies}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET ai_type = #{aiType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT current_level AS currentLevel, current_exp AS currentExp, level_up_exp AS levelUpExp, total_exp AS totalExp FROM user_levels WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT pleasure, arousal, dominance, mood_description AS moodDescription FROM user_emotions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT tag_name AS tagName FROM user_interest_tags WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_interest_tags (user_id, tag_name, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tagName}, 0, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_deleted = 0, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE user_interest_tags SET is_deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tag_name = #{tagName} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM conver_messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT DATE(MIN(created_at)) AS firstDate FROM conver_messages WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
